rule.description: Group of GCP logs
GCP dns query event
GCP internet event
GCP virtual machine event
GCP info event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP warning event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP notice event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP error with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP critical event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP alert event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP emergency event with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP info event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP warning event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP notice event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP error event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP critical event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP alert event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP emergency event from VM $(gcp.jsonPayload.vmInstanceName) with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location) with response code $(gcp.jsonPayload.responseCode)
GCP error with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Unable to resolve domain name with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Unable to process query due to a problem with the name server with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Unable to interpret query with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Unsupported requested query with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Refuse to perform the specified operation for policy reasons with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Specified name already created, when it ought not to exist with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
The specified RR Set already exists with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
The specified RR Set does not exist, and should with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Server not authoritative for zone with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Name not contained in zone with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
DSO-TYPE not implemented with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Bad OPT version with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
TSIG Signature Failure with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Key not recognized with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Signature out of time window with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Bad TKEY Mode with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Duplicate key name with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Algorithm not supported with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Bad Truncation with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
Bad/missing Server Cookie with source IP $(gcp.jsonPayload.sourceIP) from $(gcp.resource.labels.location), severity $(gcp.severity)
A GCP event with no severity information happened on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP information event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP warning event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP notice event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP error event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP critical event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP alert event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP emergency event on project $(gcp.resource.labels.project_id), monitored resource type: $(gcp.resource.type)
GCP Bucket Deleted
GCP Firewall Rule Deleted
GCP Compute Instance Stopped
GCP Default Firewall Rule Changed
GCP Firewall Rule Created
GCP Service Account Created
GCP Service Account Key Created
GCP Resource Assigned to Billing Account
GCP Service Account Enabled
GCP Service Account Undeleted
GCP Storage Bucket Created
GCP Role Created
GCP Service Account Disabled
GCP Compute Instance Started
GCP - New Open Storage Buckets Detected
GCP Successful Login
GCP Login Failure
GCP Same User Login Failed Multiple times: $(gcp.protoPayload.authenticationInfo.principalEmail)
GCP Possible break-in attempt from IP $(srcip)
Successful GCP login from Tor-IP
Successful GCP login from malware-IP
[WHITELIST] Legitimate Service Account operation
